name: dk-vscode-llm-cache
description: Local semantic cache + memory proxy between VSCode LLM clients (Claude Code, Copilot Chat) and upstream providers. Boots a local mosquitodog-vscode binary and routes API calls through it.

mosquitodogLlmCache.binaryPath.description: Path to the mosquitodog-vscode binary. Use bare name if it's on PATH; absolute path otherwise.

mosquitodogLlmCache.port.description: Port the local mosquitodog cache binds to (loopback only).

mosquitodogLlmCache.anthropicApiKey.description: Anthropic API key. Falls back to ANTHROPIC_API_KEY env var if unset. Stored as plaintext in settings — prefer the env var or the secret-store flow once available.

mosquitodogLlmCache.anthropicModel.description: Anthropic model id passed as ANTHROPIC_MODEL to mosquitodog-vscode.

mosquitodogLlmCache.exportBaseUrl.description: Export ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:<port> to integrated terminals so Claude Code routes through the cache.

mosquitodogLlmCache.exposeBypassModel.description: Advertise a second '<family> (no cache)' model in the Copilot Chat picker that bypasses the cache for that turn. One-click escape from a wrong-cache hit; turn off to declutter the model list.

mosquitodogLlmCache.includeFileContext.description: Send a fingerprint of currently open editor files with each chat request so the cache busts when a referenced file is edited in this VSCode session. Uses document.version (per-session monotonic counter) — does not catch edits made while VSCode was closed.
